narrative:
Liberty Twp township has 579 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
